title: cineraria bicolor subsp. ambigua
intro: Cineraria bicolor subsp. ambigua, also known as the Cape marigold or bush marigold, is a perennial herb native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Cineraria bicolor subsp. ambigua include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
